Segment Tracking Series into Foraging Trips

Source: R/trip_utils.R
segment_trips.Rd

Assigns sequential trip IDs to chronological sequences of points away from the colony. Points at the colony receive `NA` for the trip ID.

segment_trips(
  track,
  bird_id_col = "track_id",
  datetime_col = "datetime_gmt",
  colony_flag_col = "at_colony",
  trip_id_col = "trip_id"
)

Arguments

track

A data frame or tibble containing colony-flagged tracking points.

bird_id_col

Character. Individual or track ID column. Default is `"track_id"`.

datetime_col

Character. Datetime column. Default is `"datetime_gmt"`.

colony_flag_col

Character. Logical colony-attendance column. Default is `"at_colony"`.

trip_id_col

Character. Output trip ID column. Default is `"trip_id"`.

Value

An ordered data frame with a trip ID column.

Contents
